evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: trustworthy, consistent, accessible; data contracts; modeling standards; reliability

evidence.domain_risk: Finance, Operations, Procurement teams with data contracts framing

evidence.jd_authorship: design and own the semantic layer; establish data contracts; architect data models; drive generative analytics

evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Finance explicitly named as primary collaborator.
evidence.autonomy_level: design and own the semantic layer; establish standards; architect models; drive capabilities
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic ownership signals ('own', 'design', 'establish', 'drive') indicate autonomy over direction.
evidence.ai_role: leverage AI tools to enhance output; active user of AI tools

evidence.testing_framing: establish data contracts across business domains
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data contracts framed as core responsibility for ensuring trustworthiness.

evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of establishment ('establish standards') and optimization ('improve').

evidence.loss_aversion: data trustworthy, consistent, accessible; data contracts as governance
